36.5cm long Military Combat knife. Non-reflective, rust resistant. Weighted for throwing. No Civilian or Police cR upcharge.

43cm long extended Military Combat knife. Non-reflective, rust resistant. Weighted for throwing. These Combat Knives are molecularly sharpened for the purpose of stabbing through Mjolnir and Energy Shields.
50.1cm long Military Combat knife. Non-reflective, rust resistant. No Civilian or Police cR upcharge.
A small, Concealable Military Combat knife. Non-reflective, rust resistant. No Civilian or Police cR upcharge.
Lengthened Military Dagger with a 49cm long carbon-steel blade. Non-reflective, carbide coating, rust resistant. No Civilian or Police cR upcharge.
Military Dagger with a 30cm blade and a 12cm weighted handle. Non-reflective, carbide coating, rust resistant. No Civilian or Police cR upcharge.
Military Dagger with a 43cm blade and a 12cm weighted handle. Non-reflective, carbide coating, rust resistant. No Civilian or Police cR upcharge.
Military Tomahawk with a 30cm head and a 38cm handle. Non-reflective, carbide coating, rust resistant. No Civilian or Police cR upcharge.
Law Enforcement baton, 91cm in length. Collapsible to 12cm with a spring-loaded mechanism for Quick drawing. No Civilian or Police cR upcharge.
Sharpened and small collapsible Military Shovel. Doubles as an emergency melee weapon by design.
A large breeching hammer designed for forceful entry.
This weapon augments the Character’s Punching-based Melee Attacks by adding additional Damage.
Electrified baton 51cm in length. Glows a purple color, easily seen in dark lighting. No Civilian or Police cR upcharge.

Used to disable opponents. Pepper Spray Special Rule when sprayed in the face. No Police and Civilian upcharge. Holds 20 uses. Check Equipment Section for more information. Pepper Spray is not intercepted by Energy Shields.
Sticky Special Rule and Electrified (2D10) Special Rule. Uses Warfare Melee when Melee Reach and uses Warfare Range when being used as a projectile. No Police or Civilian upcharge.

column80: [BD] [2 HIT HW]. provides 20 Armor and has 300 Breakpoints.
column82: An Anti-Ballistics Riot Shield that acts as mobile cover. The Riot shield is titanium-A with a hardened plastic window to see through. The Shield covers 5 Locations for Normal sized Characters.

column80: [BD] [2 HIT HW]. Stun (2) Special Rule. provides 30 Armor and has 400 Breakpoints.
column82: The Shield covers 5 Locations for Large sized Characters. Characters with 2 or more Mythic Strength may wield this as a [OH] weapon only when in Mjolnir but reduces Melee Attacks with the Shield by 1D10 Damage Roll and all Melee Attacks take a Half Action to perform.

Common pair of large-scale cable cutters. Able to cut large chain links and other pieces of metal. More than strong enough to cut off a finger of any race. On Helpless or Stunned Characters that cannot fight back, Melee Attacks with Wire Cutters deal 2D10 +9 Damage, with 15 Pierce. If not against a Helpless or Stunned Character, Melee Attacks with this weapon gain a -30 To Hit.

Powerful bolt cutters, 1.3 meters long. Strong enough to cut through even Covenant metals and locks and can even lop off the fingers of any known Race. On Helpless or Stunned Characters that cannot fight back, Melee Attacks with Bolt Cutters deal 2D10 +14 Damage, with 18 Pierce. If not against a Helpless or Stunned Character, Melee Attacks with this weapon gain a -30 To Hit.
Covenant curved knife with a 25cm blade. -10 Penalty when throwing.
Enlarged curved knife with a 45cm blade. -10 Penalty when throwing.
A large 55cm blade. -10 Penalty when throwing. Has a protective handguard that gives a 10 Armor Rating to Attacks against the hand wielding the blade.
The rarity and status that comes from owning and using a Burnblade in Combat gives +10 to Social Skill Tests with other Covenant members.

Covenant estoc. Has an energy projector that houses thousands of shards of Subanese Crystals. With each successful hit, the Subanese Crystals are released into the Opponent. Once the weapon has made 30 successful Hits, it loses the Needle (1) Special Rule and cannot be repaired or recharged. Needle Special Rule does not Damage the User.
An ancient, large 110cm dual blade. -20 Penalty To Hit when throwing.  Can’t be used with two hands on Characters Normal Size Category and larger.
An ancient, massive Sangheili polearm. Can only make one Attack per Half Action.

A cutlass sword with a blade of Blamite-infused plasma. When an Attack is landed and deals Damage, the Cutlass gains the Needle (1) Special Rule and instantly detonates against the Target. The Energy Cutlass is not damaged or destroyed during this. A Thrust Attack can be made that is Slow Special Rule and instantly detonates the sword if it deals Damage to a Character, destroying it. This gives the Attack Needle (7) Special Rule. Needle Special Rule does not Damage the User.

When activated, the Gravity Hammer has the Gravity (4) Special Rule. The Gravity Hammer must physically hit the Hammer for it to roll it to Activate. Any Character, except for the User, will be affected if they are still within the 4 Meter radius of the Hammer’s strike. Anyone behind the User is not affected by the Hammer’s Gravity Special Rule.
Deactivates when not held. 46cm blade when activated.
Deactivates when not held. 128cm blade when activated.
Deactivates when not held. If attacking using this weapon when deactivated, it deals the Deactivated Type damage set.

column1: Vii’bold Pattern Energy Stave Metal Pole

column82: Deactivates when not held. A dual-sided Lance with a metal pole. If attacking using this weapon when deactivated, it deals the Deactivated Type damage set.  If the User has the Modern Army Combative Ability, the User gains +1 to their total Melee Attacks per Full Action.

column1: Thebetem Pattern Energy Lance Metal Pole

column82: Two small cylinders unravel into a garrote. +20 to Grappling Attacks when attempting to Strangle a Character.

column80: [BD] [OH]. has a Shield Integrity of 225, a Recharge Rate of 225 and a Recharge Delay of 7.
column82: A Shield that has a 1.2 Meter diameter and can cover 3 body locations on Normal sized Characters, where one must be the arm holding the Shield. Has a Shield Integrity of 225, a Recharge Rate of 225, and a Recharge Delay of 7. Gives an extra -10 Penalty To Hit when using with weapons that do not come with the [OH] Tag before modification. Slow Special Rule when used as a Melee Weapon.

column1: Murmifo Pattern Wrist Point Defense Gauntlet
column80: [BD] [OH]. has a Shield Integrity of 225, a Recharge Rate of 225 and a Recharge Delay of 6.
column82: A set of two small wrist-mounted Shields for each wrist that cover one body location alongside the Forearm sublocations. Has a Shield Integrity of 225, a Recharge Rate of 225, and a Recharge Delay of 6.

column1: B’nall Pattern Sangheili Point Defense Gauntlet
column80: [BD] [OH]. has a Shield Integrity of 225, a Recharge Rate of 225 and a Recharge Delay of 7.
column82: A Shield that has a 1.5 Meter diameter and can cover 3 body locations on Large sized Characters, where one must be the arm holding the Shield. Has a Shield Integrity of 225, a Recharge Rate of 225, and a Recharge Delay of 7.  Slow Special Rule when used as a Melee Weapon.

column1: Ratent Pattern Hunter Heavy Metal Shield
column80: [BD] [2 HIT HW]. Kinetic, Stun (5) Special Rule. provides 50 Armor and has 1000 Breakpoints.
column82: The Heavy Metal Shield cannot be Parried and can only swing once per Half Action by a Mgalekgolo, or once per Full Action by any other Soldier Type.  The Hunter Shield covers 3 Locations on Hulking size Characters.

A hidden circular shield that replaces the gauntlet of the armor being worn. Takes one Half Action to fold out and back in. The shield can protect the Arm using the Shield alongside two chosen Body Locations on Large Characters.
A large 55cm knife. -10 Penalty when throwing. Has a protective handguard that gives +6 Armor to Attacks against the hand wielding the blade.
A large 55cm knife. -10 Penalty when throwing. Has a protective handguard that gives +6 Armor to Attacks against the hand wielding the blade.

A rare device that attaches to the back of the Character’s hand that emits a plasma gauntlet. This weapon adds +15 Piercing to the Character’s Punch Melee Attacks and gives it the Cauterize Special Rule.

A gauntlet that adds +1 Armor to the Wrist Sublocations. The blade takes one Half Action to extend and retract. The weapon cannot be used when retracted. The Gauntlet may be used to make one single Attack in a Full Action where the blade is extended during a melee attack. This doubles the Piercing of the Attack and gives +1 to Base Damage.

When activated, the Gravity Hammer has the Gravity (5) Special Rule. The Gravity Hammer must physically hit the Hammer for it to roll its Damage. Any Character, except for the User, will be affected if they are still within the 4 Meter radius of the Hammer’s strike. Anyone behind the User is not affected by the Hammer’s Gravity Special Rule. Slow Special Rule.

column80: [BD] [SLOW HW]. Cauterize, Stun (3), Gravity (4) Special Rule.
column82: When activated, the Gravity Axe has the Gravity (4) Special Rule. The Gravity Axe must physically hit the Axe for it to roll its Damage. Any Character, except for the User, will be affected if they are still within the 4 Meter radius of the Axe’s strike. Anyone behind the User is not affected by the Axe’s Gravity Special Rule. Slow Special Rule. Gravity Special Rule is not improved by the weapon’s Pierce.

When activated, the Gravity Mace has the Gravity (3) Special Rule and several Plasma blades are emitted from the Mace. The Gravity Mace must physically hit the Mace for it to roll its Damage. Any Character, except for the User, will be affected if they are still within the 3 Meter radius of the Mace’s strike. Anyone behind the User is not affected by the Mace’s Gravity Special Rule. Gravity Special Rule is not improved by the weapon’s Pierce.

column80: [BD] [2 HIT HW]. Stun (3) Special Rule. provides 35 Armor and has 400 Breakpoints.
column82: For Large sized Characters and smaller, it can protect the entire Body. The Tower Shield is able to be deployed like mobile cover, and be implanted into the ground.
A sword made of Hard Light that can be deactivated and activated as a Half Action. When activated, the Hardlight Blade is 133cm long.
A sword made of Hard Light that can be deactivated and activated as a Half Action. When activated, the Hardlight Blade is 133cm long.

A large metallic stave with a Hardlight sphere at the end. When wielded by a Promethean, a Full Action may be used to spin the Stave at inhuman speeds that will act as a Large Physical Shield with 50 Armor and infinite Breakpoints, which will last until the next Turn. While being used this way, the Stave can’t be used for Attacks.

A large metallic stave with a Hardlight sphere at the end. When wielded by a Promethean, a Full Action may be used to spin the Stave at inhuman speeds that will act as a Large Physical Shield with 50 Armor and infinite Breakpoints, which will last until the next Turn. While being used this way, the Stave can’t be used for Attacks.

A dual-sided sword made of Hard Light that can be deactivated and activated as a Half Action. When activated, the Hardlight Blade is 155 cm long. If the User has the Modern Army Combative Ability, the User gains +1 to their total Melee Attacks per Full Action.

A two-handed wrench-like device used to move objects that the Character would not normally be able to use. The Gravity Wrench has the ability to switch between Gravimetric (3) and Gravity (5) as a Half Action. The Gravimetric and Gravity Special Rules can only target one Object or Character of up to 350kg. Characters will take half Damage from the Gravimetric and Gravity Special Rules. Slow Special Rule. Characters trapped within these Special Rules will be able to make a -40 Strength Test to escape. They may also use Evasion to avoid being caught. Both the Gravimetric and Gravity Special Rules cannot reach out further than the Gravity Wrench’s Range.
Elongated claws made of random fingers and extra grown hands.
A blade made of bone.
A hardened, quick bludgeoning clump of biomass.
A large flesh-made cudgel.
A whip made of biomass.
Deals 2D10 Damage to Attacking Character, ignoring Armor. If the Head-butt strikes the Opponent’s Head, the Attack ignores the Opponent’s Armor. Takes two Melee Attacks to perform.
Takes two Melee Attacks to perform.
